title: Add pytest test suite: PatternEngine, DriveEngine, Room, HTTP routes
description: Set up pytest + pytest-aiohttp + pytest-asyncio. Write tests for PatternEngine (8 waveforms, tick, set_command, stop), DriveEngine (command handling, state endpoint, preset load), Room (lifecycle, expiry), and HTTP route integration tests (auth, command, state, rider-state). Create requirements-dev.txt, pytest.ini, tests/ directory with conftest.py and test modules.
close_reason: 45 tests passing: PatternEngine, DriveEngine, Room, HTTP routes. Merged to main.

title: Fix preset sync: single source of truth on server, delete JS_PRESETS
description: Presets are duplicated between Python PRESETS dict (real values) and JS_PRESETS (slider-raw values). Fix: add hz/depth to /state endpoint, write syncUIFromState(d) with inverse slider math, rewrite loadPreset() to fetch /state after applying preset, delete JS_PRESETS entirely. Build preset buttons dynamically from state.presets list.
close_reason: JS_PRESETS deleted. Server is single source of truth. syncUIFromState + inverse slider math. 47 tests passing.

title: Extract HTML/JS/CSS into Jinja2 templates and static files
description: Extract 6 HTML blocks from redrive.py and server.py into Jinja2 templates. Extract inline CSS to public/css/, JS to public/js/. Replace _inject_prefix() with Jinja2 template variables (api_prefix, driver_key, room_code). Add aiohttp-jinja2 integration. Configure nginx to serve /public/ directly. Ensure both server relay mode and local LAN mode (redrive.py) can load templates. Phase: HTML first, then CSS, then JS extraction.
close_reason: 6 HTML blocks extracted to Jinja2 templates, CSS/JS to public/, _inject_prefix killed. redrive.py: 3309->1144 lines, server.py: 1899->849 lines. 47 tests passing.

title: Add Linux AppImage build for rider_app.py
description: Create build/build_linux.sh using python-appimage (niess/python-appimage) to bundle rider_app.py with Python + aiohttp + tkinter into a standalone .AppImage. Add GitHub Actions workflow for building on tag push. Update version.json and rider_app.py update checker with Linux download URL.
close_reason: build_linux.sh, GH Actions workflow, rider_app.py Linux detection, version.json updated. Merged.

title: Driver name not updating in rider UI
description: Setting the driver name on the driver page doesn't appear to update the 'Driven by' display on the rider page. May be a WebSocket message routing issue or the rider page not listening for the update.
close_reason: Fixed: added set_driver_name handler and /rider-state endpoint to LAN mode.

title: Poppers button does nothing
description: Clicking the Poppers button on the driver page has no visible effect. The button should trigger a full-screen overlay on the rider page via the bottle_active flag in /rider-state polling.
close_reason: Fixed: added bottle command handler and /rider-state endpoint to LAN mode.

title: Preset activates touch panel animation but no signal reaches ReStim
description: Loading the Milking preset shows the indicator moving on the Touch panel, but ReStim receives no signal change. The pattern engine is running but T-code may not be reaching the ReStim WebSocket. Could be related to the unclosed client session issue or a send path bug after the template extraction.
close_reason: Fixed: root cause was session leak preventing reconnect. Also fixed /tcode URL path.

title: Unclosed aiohttp ClientSession spam in console
description: Console is flooded with 'Unclosed client session' warnings from aiohttp. The _connect() method in DriveEngine creates a new ClientSession on every reconnect attempt without closing the previous one. Need to reuse the session or close it properly.
close_reason: Fixed: _connect() now closes old session/ws before creating new ones. _send() error handler closes both.

title: Mouse cursor hidden behind image on Touch panel
description: On the driver Touch panel, the mouse cursor is visually buried behind the anatomy overlay image, making it invisible when hovering over the canvas area. Likely a z-index or pointer-events CSS issue.
close_reason: Fixed: added dark outline/shadow to dot and grid cursors for contrast over anatomy images.

title: WebSocket unification: server-side protocol (Phase 1)
description: Extend handle_driver_ws to process commands, add state push loop, driver_status broadcast, bottle push, fix route collision, add max_msg_size and rate limiting. Tests first.
close_reason: 71 tests. Server WS protocol: command processing, state push, driver_status, bottle push, route fix, max_msg_size.

title: WebSocket unification: LAN mode endpoints (Phase 2)
description: Add /driver-ws and /rider-ws endpoints to redrive.py, state push loop, T-code fan-out to rider_wss. Tests first.
close_reason: 79 tests. LAN WS: /driver-ws + /rider-ws endpoints, state push loop, T-code fan-out, _build_app extraction.

title: WebSocket unification: driver JS (Phase 3)
description: Rewrite sendCmd to use WS, extract handleStateUpdate, extend connectDriverWS for LAN mode, remove polling, replace heartbeat ping.
close_reason: sendCmd uses WS with HTTP fallback, handleStateUpdate extracted, polling removed, heartbeat replaced with WS ping.

title: WebSocket unification: touch/rider JS (Phase 4)
description: Replace rider-state polling with WS push handlers, update WS URL to /rider-ws, add LAN mode WS, add driver-connected indicator.
close_reason: Touch WS URL updated to /rider-ws, LAN mode WS, polling removed, driver_status indicator added.

title: WebSocket unification: rider_client.py + rider_app.py (Phase 5)
description: Filter JSON messages in rider_client, remove heartbeat=30 on ReStim, update WS URL, add driver_status/bottle_status parsing to rider_app tkinter.
close_reason: rider_client filters JSON, heartbeat removed, WS URL updated. rider_app parses driver_status/bottle_status, shows connection indicator.

title: WebSocket unification: dead polling cleanup (Phase 7)
description: Remove setInterval(pollState), initParticipantsPoll, rider-state polling, room_banner rider count poll, heartbeat ping setInterval.
close_reason: All polling intervals removed in phases 3-4: pollState, participantsPoll, rider-state poll, banner rider count poll, heartbeat ping.

title: Simplify: Extract engine.py from redrive.py (Phase 1)
description: Extract PatternEngine, DriveEngine, DriveConfig, PRESETS into engine.py. No tkinter, no HTTP handlers. Engine logic only.
close_reason: engine.py extracted: 778 lines, zero tkinter deps. 93 tests pass.

title: Simplify: Unified server.py with --local mode (Phase 2)
description: Merge server/server.py relay code + redrive.py HTTP serving into one server.py at project root. --local flag for LAN mode, default for relay.
close_reason: Unified server.py with --local mode. 105 tests pass. server/ renamed to deploy/.

title: Simplify: Browser ReStim bridge in touch.js (Phase 3)
description: Add ReStim WS connection to rider page. T-code forwarding, settings panel, connection status, wiring config. All in localStorage.
close_reason: Browser ReStim bridge: direct WS connection, settings panel, localStorage config, T-code forwarding.

title: Simplify: Delete old code + update deployment (Phase 4-5)
description: Delete redrive.py, rider_app.py, server/server.py. Update redrive.service, setup.sh, deploy.yml, README.
close_reason: Deleted redrive.py, rider_app.py, deploy/server.py, all build scripts, build-linux workflow. -2646 lines.

title: Simplify: Update tests (Phase 6)
description: Fix all imports, remove tkinter mock, adapt LAN WS tests to unified server local mode, add test_local_mode.py.
close_reason: Tests updated: removed tkinter mock, fixed imports, 105 tests passing.
